title: The Straw Hats Meet Elbaf’s Danger
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Luffy, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Nami, Zoro as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Actually, this might be for the best!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since the brats were saved, I haven't failed the mission yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can still take them to the Holy Land as planned!! But first...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'll finish off their dying parents!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Taste my rapid fire Thorn Launcher!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This time I'm gonna save mom and the rest!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm gonna cry!!! You morons are priceless!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll never forget the brave looks on your simple faces!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this point, screw it! I don't even care about the mission anymore! I'm just grateful I get to kill you guys myself. Now. Who's going first?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: NO!! I'm gonna protect you, Mommy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew you had this in the Bag!! naha ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Zoro!! He's a member of my crew. And don't you forget it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I finally got to see it... Luffy-kun's white form...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He really does look just like Nika!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PFT!! That's just a tall tale told to scare kids!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We were really saved by that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gya! A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A A

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's cool alright... this is the first time I've seen him like this too.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So you're saying Elbaf's National Treasure is-

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
